description: Correlate a clinical photograph with a radiologic scan by displaying them side-by-side in Weasis. Using the already loaded DICOM CT scan and the clinical photograph located at '~/Desktop/clinical_photo.jpg', create a 1x2 side-by-side layout with the CT scan in the left panel and the photograph in the right panel. Export a screenshot of the workspace to '~/DICOM/exports/multimodal_comparison.png'.
